meta-description: Learn about net capital gains by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Net capital gains
excerpt: The amount by which your total long-term capital gain for the year is more than your short-term capital loss for the year.
content:
The amount by which your total long-term capital gain for the year is more than your short-term capital loss for the year.

Get more information from the IRS on capital gains and losses.
